blended.narrative: Mt. Spokane is looking at a solid round of snow over the next 48 hours, with 6 inches of moderate-density snow expected. Snow levels around 2,966 ft. Looking ahead, 16 inches possible over the next 14 days.

daily_summary.narrative: Today: 3.4" of snow, highs of 28°F. Expect variable conditions.
Tomorrow: 1.3" of snow, highs of 33°F, gusts to 44 mph.
Friday: 2.4" of snow, highs of 29°F. Expect variable conditions.
Saturday: 2.5" of snow, highs of 31°F. Expect variable conditions.
Monday: 2.6" of snow, highs of 34°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.

recent_conditions.narrative: No new snow in the past 48 hours. Base has been melting — down 4" over the past week. Current depth: 37".
